---
title: "EFP_DE"
author: "Negin Katal"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# Load required packages
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(randomForest)
library(ggpubr)

```

Read the input data

```{r}
EFPN <- read.table("MigliavaccaEcosystemfunctionsReprWorkflow/data/InputDataMigliavacca2021.csv", 
                   header = TRUE, sep = ",")

# Convert P from mm/month to mm/year
EFPN$P <- EFPN$P * 12

```
```{r}
# Define your sites of interest
selected_sites <- c("DE-Meh", "DE-Hai", "ZA-Kru", "IT-Tor", "FR-Pue", "DE-Tha")

# Filter only those sites
EFPN_sel <- subset(EFPN, SITE_ID %in% selected_sites)


```
```{r}

```
